chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 4526 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 17-03-2022 None present nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing; whereas, on 16-02-2017, the following order was passed: “Mr. Abdul Salam Advocate holding brief for Mr. Haji Shamsuddin Rajper Advocate for petitioner states that the latter is busy before another Bench. On 25.01.2017 learned counsel for petitioner was put on notice on the maintainability of this petition first, as the matter pertains to the year 2004 and the petitioner filed earlier C.P No.D-202 of 2012, which was dismissed on 01.6.2014 and the petitioner has again filed instant petition. Petitioner is directed to satisfy the Court on the maintainability of this petition specially on the point of latches. Adjourned 15.03.2017 with a note of cautious that if the learned counsel for petitioner will not comply with the order, adverse orders shall be passed.” Thereafter, nobody has turned up to assist the Court. In view of such position, it appears that the Petitioner has no case as the Petition is hit by laches. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
